---
title: "get_social_fans"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_social_fans()`

Create Social Fans Table

## Usage

```r
get_social_fans(
  token = "FLIX_PATROL",
  social_platform,
  start_date,
  end_date,
  date_type = "day"
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `token` | Character. API environment variable name. |
| `social_platform` | Character. Social media platform name (e.g., "Instagram", "Facebook", "Twitter"). |
| `start_date` | Date/Character. Start date. |
| `end_date` | Date/Character. End date. |
| `date_type` | Character. Date granularity (default '"day"'). |

## Value

A tibble of social fan rankings.

## Description

Fetches social media fan count data using the social media platform lookup table.
